programme.title: CSI on Trial
programme.desc: Reveals the lack of science behind some of the most well-known crime scene investigation tools, and tells the stories of the wrongfully convicted who went to prison for years.

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A disabled woman is brutally murdered and her neighbour is the prime suspect, but can a consultant doctor help police put him behind bars?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experiences the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derails.

programme.title: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A bleeding Charles Stuart phones 911 with a terrified tale of car-jacking that results in the death of his pregnant wife. Police mount a manhunt for the described killers; something just doesn't add up.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Detective Rayell Johnson investigates the death of an old man found dead outside his home; Atlanta Detective Kevin Leonpacher must ID the young man and woman caught on camera committing murder.

programme.title: Killer at the Crime Scene
programme.desc: From the moment a murder victim's body is discovered, the police face a race against time. This series reveals what it takes to establish a crime scene and quickly uncover the key forensic evidence.

programme.desc: Mother becomes ill; touch-and-go meningitis; shocking announcement.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: With Mrs Hall away, Siegfried mentors work experience boy Andrew, stirring Tristan's resentments, while Jenny's risky sheep mistake forces sisters to face growing up.

programme.title: Last Tango in Halifax
programme.desc: Caroline finds out why Gillian is avoiding her wedding day. Meanwhile, Celia encourages Alan to forgive Gary.

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: DCI Cassie and DI Sunny return to investigate another historic murder case after the discovery of a body found locked in a suitcase in a London river.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A spate of violent dog killings are re-investigated when it emerges the culprit may be back in action.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The murder of a police informant is reinvestigated, bringing back painful memories for Jack.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot investigates when the cruel CEO of a chemical company is bludgeoned to death in his home after the company's formula for a revolutionary new synthetic rubber is targeted by a thief.

programme.title: Blue Murder
programme.desc: After being released from prison after only 18 months for the strangling of his wife and dog, a murderer is found strangled by a dog chain.

programme.title: Blue Murder
programme.desc: A petty crook is found dead in the same lake that has been frequented by four old fishing buddies.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Ben's on the case again - this time he's got a mystery illness and is far too ill to go to school and Auntie Angela's been dumped by her boyfriend, so the family rally round to cheer her up.

programme.title: Broadchurch
programme.desc: The fate of Danny's murderer is decided. Alec and Ellie close the Sandbrook murder case.

programme.title: Lee Anderson's Real World
programme.desc: Lee Anderson brings the Real World to the Great British public, as the silent majority finally have their voices heard.

programme.title: Friday Night with Matt Goodwin
programme.desc: Britain was once the envy of the world. Join Matt Goodwin as he explores how we fix the problems facing the country.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: An ex-con sprung from prison stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour.

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: Once inseparable pals, two men find themselves on opposite sides of the law, each feeling betrayed by the other. Now, through a strange twist of fate, the pair are on the run - together.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: A man is labelled an 'In-Valid' because he was conceived not in the lab, but in love, in a future where 'designer people', forged in test tubes, rule society.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Two years after the tragic events that plagued Sidney she's moved to college putting the shocking killings behind her. That is until a copycat killer begins acting out a real-life sequel.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: In a future world devastated by disease, a convict is sent back in time to gather information about the man-made virus that wiped out most of the human population.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.desc: The re-resurrected mummy of an Egyptian high priest kidnaps the son of archaeologists who first dug him up, and sets out to destroy mankind by commanding the army of the ancient Scorpion King.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chinese mother Yang Hu finds reassurance in a Japanese word that helps her connect with others while navigating cultural differences in Tokyo.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming has raised sea temperatures, increasing powerful typhoons worldwide. The program reports on their impacts and explores with experts the mechanisms and causes of their intensification.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tsukamoto Yoshiharu (Architect) visits Nara. Long ago, people in Nara preserved ice by building an icehouse on a mountain ridge, showing how architecture can make use of natural characteristics.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: The team explores a factory in Saitama making globes for educational use and much more besides. See the skill it takes to turn flat maps into spherical globes - and what in the world is an "AR globe"?

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: Wakayama in southwest Kumano is a top producer of Japanese citrus, which is said to have its origins in a legendary fruit. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show the area's rich natural bounty.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: We come across a tranquil, snow-covered Edo cityscape. But there's something in the air: the aroma of foods both sweet and savory that helped the townspeople keep warm in the winter.

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.desc: Stories about people, stories about life. Intimate portraits of people from around Japan, each leading diverse lives while enriching lives of others.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Diary
programme.desc: At the Satoyama Kitchen guesthouse in Hida Takayama, chef Nobuko, her cameraman husband Makoto and their cat Tama take us on a tasty journey of local cuisine served with a side of seasonal scenery.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Stephen Turner, from the UK, loves Japanese trains so much that his passion became his job. We join him on a trip through Chiba Prefecture and explore the appeal of Japan's regional railways.

programme.title: Electric Dreams

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: Dust Devil
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
programme.desc: A father and son, both coroners, are pulled into a complex mystery while attempting to identify the body of a young woman.

programme.title: Severance
programme.desc: A bonding weekend goes horribly wrong for seven colleagues who find themselves facing the chop when they are sabotaged by a deadly enemy. Only the smartest will survive this brutal office outing.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: Hellbound: Hellraiser II
programme.desc: Kristy Cotton is in a psychiatric hospital reliving the hellish events pertaining to a certain puzzle box that contains deadly spirits.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: The Holy Mountain
programme.desc: A Mexican master (Alexandro Jodorowsky) leads a Christ figure (Horacio Salinas) and other disciples to a mountain of immortal wise men.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Billy Warlock) discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: Hell House LLC
programme.desc: Five years after 15 people were killed during a haunted house tour, a documentary crew visits the scene to investigate what really happened.

programme.title: Hell House LLC II: The Abbadon Hotel
programme.desc: Eight years after a hotel's tragic opening, an investigative journalist is convinced key evidence remains in the abandoned hotel.

programme.title: Hell House LLC III: Lake Of Fire
programme.desc: The Abaddon Hotel will once again be open to the public. Russell Wynn has taken his audience-interactive show, Insomnia, into the abandoned hotel that is rumored to be haunted.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars is content with his artificial girlfriend: a life-sized doll named Bianca. When he develops feelings for an attractive co-worker, Lars finds himself lost in a unique love triangle.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: Cypher
programme.desc: Paranoia drives this hi-tech cyber thriller when a computer programmer who turns to corporate espionage is caught in a spiral where even his own identity is put in doubt.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: The survivor (Josh Stewart) of a madman's torture chamber leads a team of mercenaries back to the same booby-trapped lair to rescue a captive woman (Emma Fitzpatrick).

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: District B13: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Explosive sequel set in a futuristic Paris. Corrupt cops conspire to launch a nuclear strike and take over a ghetto terrorised by marauding drug gangs and killers. Subtitles.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: The Navigator: A Medieval Odyssey
programme.desc: A young 14th Century boy with acute psychic powers believes that he can rescue his fellow villagers by tunnelling their way through the earth. To their surprise they come out in New Zealand in 1988.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: A Bittersweet Life
programme.desc: A gangster starts a violent feud after he refuses to kill his boss's cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: Prisoners Of The Ghostland
programme.desc: In the treacherous frontier city of Samurai Town, a notorious criminal must break an evil curse in order to rescue an abducted girl who has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs
programme.desc: Chan Wing Yan, a young police officer, has been sent undercover as a mole in the local mafia. Lau Kin Ming, a young mafia member, infiltrates the police force.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs II
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, Chan Wing Yan goes undercover in the triads as Lau Kin Ming joins the police. Both sides face a common threat from a rival crime boss. (Subtitles)

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Oasis
programme.desc: An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
programme.desc: On returning home from a mental health facility, two sisters find that, along with their stepmother, they have to find a way to deal with their late mother's ghost who begins to haunt them.

programme.title: Thesis
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Deliver Us
programme.desc: When a nun in a remote convent claims immaculate conception, priests investigate, concerned she will give birth to twin boys: one the Messiah, the other the Anti-Christ.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a brutal killer, they find themselves in a deadly no-man's-land known as the Thicket.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: A young boy in a small North Dakota town befriends a potentially dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Sasquatch Sunset
programme.desc: In the misty forests of North America, a family of Sasquatches find themselves on a collision course with the ever-changing world around them.

programme.title: Hellraiser
programme.desc: A horrifying, living-dead version of Julia's husband appears and coerces her to seduce and kill men so that he can feed on their blood to regain his flesh.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Sator
programme.desc: Secluded in a desolate forest, a broken family is observed by the demon Sator who is attempting to claim them.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Canadian Border Services Officers work on the front lines, intercepting suspicious travellers and contraband from around the world to help keep Canada safe.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: An Australian returns with illegal items in his underwear. A Chinese man tests an officer's patience. Pistons are found among illegal goods.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: When a trusted friend vanishes without a trace, rising political tensions cast a long and dangerous shadow over Jamie and Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: And The World Was All Around Us
programme.desc: Everything Jamie and Claire have built is on the line. With danger closing in, only their bond can see them through.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While on her second honeymoon, World War II nurse Claire Randall is mysteriously transported back in time to 1743 Scotland where she is kidnapped by a group of Highlanders and meets a young man named Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is taken to Castle Leoch, where she meets the Laird. As suspicions about her identity run high, Claire tries to blend in, and befriends the mysterious Geillis Duncan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Castle Leoch is readied for a gathering of the MacKenzie clan, Claire attempts to treat a young poisoning victim, placing her at odds with a powerful priest who demands to perform an exorcism.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire lays plans to escape during the Gathering, the rivalry between Jamie and Dougal intensifies.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As she accompanies Dougal on a trip to collect the rents owed to the MacKenzies laird, Claire witnesses brutality on both sides of the conflict between the Scottish rebels and the British royal army.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Claire and Dougal are brought in for questioning by a royal army commander, they come face to face with the sadistic Black Jack Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Men in Kilts
programme.sub-title: Scotland By Land, Air And Sea
programme.desc: A road trip with Sam and Graham. The pair share, and show off, the natural wonders of their home country with the world.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire must reconcile her future with the life and love she left behind. Shifting back to 18th century, Jamie, Claire, and Murtagh arrive on the shores of France.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Life in Paris is not without its trials as Jamie struggles to triumph over the traumas of his past.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie's days and nights are dominated by political machinations, while Claire finds solace in her healing skills.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is brought to L'Hopital Des Anges where doctors try to save her life and that of her unborn baby. King Louis asks Claire to judge two men accused of practising the dark arts - one an enemy, one a friend.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie call upon Jamie's grandsire, Lord Lovat, in an attempt to elicit support for the Jacobite cause.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie reunite with the Lallybroch and MacKenzie men during training. Meanwhile, an Englishman arrives in camp with new information.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of 'history', Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face a choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds, but Jamie's new business dealings jeopardise the couple's hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship. Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines. Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters cripples the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica, bringing Jamie and Claire closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Fraser's encounter old allies and former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.
